producer_roles: ClinMAP-VOI v0 framework and metamorphic relation design
Hosted multi-model evaluation execution and corpus curation
Primary human domain review (3971 response-level annotations)
Post-review QA audit and performance reporting
claim_boundary: Synthetic healthcare-domain evaluation benchmark produced for inspectable model-behavior review. Not clinical validation.

review_layers.protocol_qc: secondary_review_pass.jsonl (blind QA + contract-consistency passes; internal QA, not anonymous panelists)

holdout_review.identity_policy: Public artifacts use pseudonymous panel IDs only; private identity registry is intentionally omitted from git.
holdout_review.claim_boundary: Two pseudonymous independent external reviewers on CMVOI-033–040 only; not full-corpus multi-human review.
